validation_steps.name: Operator impact
validation_steps.description: Categorization behavior unchanged for end users
validation_steps.evidence: #resolveCategory pipeline unchanged; external contract preserved; 4 regression tests pass

validation_steps.name: Schema contract
validation_steps.evidence: response_format.type=json_schema; strict=true; enum from runtime categories + UNKNOWN; additionalProperties=false

validation_steps.name: Error resilience
validation_steps.description: 429 retry still works (v4 error mapping preserves status code)
validation_steps.evidence: APIError.status=429 → OpenAiException.code=429; #retryWithBackoff checks error.code===429; maxRetries:0 prevents SDK double-retry; test oai-5 confirms

validation_steps.name: Model selection
validation_steps.description: OPENAI_MODEL env var still controls model selection
validation_steps.evidence: Field default gpt-4o-mini; constructor reads OPENAI_MODEL; setModel validates allowlist; classify uses this.#model

validation_steps.name: Backward compatibility
validation_steps.description: Webhook/bulk/test-webhook paths still work (all funnel through #resolveCategory → classify)
validation_steps.evidence: All 3 endpoints → #resolveCategory → #retryWithBackoff → classify(); no contract changes; resolveCategory tests 1-4 unchanged

validation_steps.name: Code quality
validation_steps.description: No leftover v3 patterns in OpenAiService.js
validation_steps.evidence: Grep for response.data, .data[0], v3 → 0 matches; all methods use v4 chat.completions.create

validation_steps.name: Documentation
validation_steps.description: Architecture references current (model, SDK, env vars)
validation_steps.evidence: architecture.md lines 103,198,849,863,868,887,961-965 all reference openai@^4, gpt-4o-mini default, OPENAI_MODEL env, injectable client

AC-1.description: classify() uses Structured Outputs with category enum derived from Firefly category list

AC-2.description: Invalid/hallucinated category names cannot be returned (schema enforcement)

AC-3.description: Existing webhook, bulk, and test-webhook paths pass US-0001 regression tests without behavior regression on happy path

AC-4.description: OPENAI_MODEL env still selects model; default remains gpt-4o-mini

AC-5.description: Rate-limit backoff (#retryWithBackoff) still applies on 429 responses

observations: gpt-3.5-turbo does not support json_schema (returns 400) — documented and acceptable since default is gpt-4o-mini
Schema size for typical deployments (<50 categories) is well within limits
